title: Standardize Excalidraw palette and diagram README for optimizer procedure docs
description: Create a shared Excalidraw palette for documentation diagrams and document the one approved workflow for reusing it. Move the existing optimizer palette to documentation/diagrams/palette.excalidraw, add documentation/diagrams/README.md, and update any references to the old path so optimizer procedure diagrams use the shared style.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Implementing optimizer cognition slides

Creating a 4-slide Excalidraw set in documentation/diagrams/optimizer-multi-agent-procedure/ using the shared palette style already staged in the working tree.

Slides planned:
- From Judgment to Reflection to Learning
- Cognition
- Meta-cognition
- Meta-learning

Visual direction:
- landscape slide canvas
- title at top
- pale purple containers, white question boxes, blue directional arrows
- formal labels with plain-English subtitles

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Optimizer cognition slides created

Added four Excalidraw slides in documentation/diagrams/optimizer-multi-agent-procedure/:
- From Judgment to Reflection to Learning.excalidraw
- Cognition.excalidraw
- Meta-cognition.excalidraw
- Meta-learning.excalidraw

Validation completed:
- jq JSON parse passes for all 4 files
- all slide bounds are within a consistent 1600x900 canvas
- terminology is consistent across summary and detail slides

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Building custom Cognition slide

Designing a bespoke cognition slide rather than reusing the old generic detail-slide template.

Planned content:
- stream of transcript items
- scorecard + score evaluation layer
- per-item prediction outputs with value and explanation
- feedback edits shown only on some items to establish that feedback is intermittent rather than universal

This slide will stay on the task-judgment step and avoid drifting into RCA or optimization-cycle detail.
